content:
- Completed the switchover semantics task end-to-end, committed it as f475de4, and pushed master successfully.
- Post-commit docs hook also published the mdBook dist to the separate docs repo (docs sync commit b222fff1 there) and finished cleanly.
- Workspace is ready for handoff; no AGENTS.md update was needed.

- Read current progress log and current task summaries.
- Found three active candidate tasks in current_tasks.md and started checking their concrete files for priority and blocker tags.
- Next: resolve blocked_by against current_tasks_done.md, choose the highest-precedence unblocked task, write its path to .ralph/current_task.txt, and quit.

- Inspected all active task files directly; none had blocked_by tags, so all three active tasks are currently unblocked.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-managed-start-intent-architecture/typed-network-endpoints-instead-of-raw-strings.md because it is an unblocked failing task with no low priority tag, so it outranks the two low-priority failing tasks.
- Wrote the selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt and am quitting immediately.

- Started new turn by reading the Ralph progress log and .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Current task points to .ralph/tasks/story-managed-start-intent-architecture/typed-network-endpoints-instead-of-raw-strings.md.
- Next I am reading the task file, checking whether it is in planning, verification, or execution state, and will follow that phase exactly.

- Read the active task file and confirmed it was in the initial planning phase with no review/execution marker yet.
- Mapped the raw endpoint flow across config schema/parser, runtime node startup, etcd store worker internals, and HA E2E harness startup/proxy code.
- Wrote a detailed implementation plan into the task file, including the current flow map, proposed typed models, file-by-file execution steps, verification commands, and a note that the requested update-docs skill is not available in this session.
- Added the required TO BE VERIFIED marker at the end of the task file and stopped before any implementation, per the workflow.
- Next turn should read the task file, perform a deep skeptical review of the plan, change at least one part of it, and only then replace TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE if the revised plan is solid.

- Read progress log and current task pointer.
- Confirmed active task is typed-network-endpoints-instead-of-raw-strings and prior turn left the file at TO BE VERIFIED.
- Next I am reading the task markdown, reviewing the plan skeptically, and will alter at least one part before advancing the marker.

- Reviewed the typed-endpoint task plan skeptically, revised it to split raw DCS input from typed runtime config, and switched the task marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented the new config endpoint module, changed API listen_addr to SocketAddr, added DcsConfigInput, normalized DCS/API endpoints in the parser, and threaded typed endpoints into runtime/node, etcd store, and HA harness startup/runtime-config helpers.
- Cargo check is being used as the fast compile loop; current remaining work is cleanup of compile fallout in tests/call sites, then full verification with make check/test/test-long/lint and docs review.

- Completed the typed network endpoint refactor: API listen addresses are SocketAddr, DCS runtime endpoints are typed, parser normalization is explicit, runtime/store/harness internals no longer carry raw strings, and remaining string encoding is confined to external boundaries.
- Updated the runtime configuration docs to reflect stricter DCS endpoint validation and marked the task file complete with passes=true.
- Verification passed end-to-end: make check, make test (383 passed), make test-long (9 ultra-long + Docker smoke coverage), and make lint all succeeded. Next step is commit + push the finished task.
